assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 18-19 show 'git checkout TC-9005' and 'git pull' under section '1. Check out the Target Branch (TC-9005)', followed by line 28 'git checkout -b TC-9205' to create the task branch. The plan explicitly states 'Per Step 5 of the SKILL.md, we check out the target branch first'.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 149 shows 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title ...' and line 146 states 'Create PR targeting the feature branch TC-9005 (NOT main)'. Line 159 reiterates '--base TC-9005 ensures the PR targets the feature branch, not main'.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 28 shows 'git checkout -b TC-9205' and lines 31 explicitly states 'The branch name is TC-9205 (the task ID), NOT TC-9005 (the feature branch / target branch)'.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 37-39 under 'Pre-Implementation Verification (Step 4)' list: '1. Read migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs', '2. Read migration/src/lib.rs', '3. Read entity/src/advisory.rs'. All three files are referenced for inspection before implementation.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 127 shows the commit command includes '--trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"'. Line 162 also reiterates 'The commit includes --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"'.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 110 shows the commit message 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' which follows type(scope): description format. Line 121 shows 'Implements TC-9205' in the commit message footer.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 8 states '**Target Branch**: TC-9005 (feature branch, NOT main)' and line 16 states 'The task specifies Target Branch as TC-9005'. The plan clearly identifies and extracts TC-9005 as the target branch from the task description.
